headline: Biogen Expands Targeted Therapy Pipeline With Apellis Deal And Alloy Alliance
summary: Biogen has agreed to acquire Apellis Pharmaceuticals after an extended negotiation process. The company also entered a collaboration with Alloy Therapeutics focused on antisense drug development using the AntiClastic ASO Platform. These moves expand Biogen's presence in targeted therapies and antisense technologies beyond previously discussed valuation topics. For investors watching NasdaqGS:BIIB, these transactions come with the stock trading at around $177.35 and a 1 year return of 49.5%...
